name: ClawdContext OS
postCreateCommand: make setup && echo '✅ ClawdContext OS ready — run: make scan'
postStartCommand: echo '╔══════════════════════════════════════╗' && echo '║   ClawdContext OS — Ready            ║' && echo '║                                      ║' && echo '║   make scan      → Security scan     ║' && echo '║   make cer       → CER analysis      ║' && echo '║   make red-team  → Attack sims       ║' && echo '║   make up        → Start stack       ║' && echo '║   make help      → All commands      ║' && echo '╚══════════════════════════════════════╝'
